benchmarkNeutralResolvedDependencies.swift-nio: Transitive EventSource transport primitives do not participate in prepared Qwen model loading, tokenization, or synthesis; lockstep, security-baseline, and deterministic build checks still apply.

retiredLegacySPI.name: VocelloQwen3LegacyCompatibility
retiredLegacySPI.policy: Phase 14b retired the named SPI. Prepared-model loading, post-load metadata, preparation diagnostics, priming, and schema-3 clone-artifact persistence/adoption are actor-owned public surfaces; the previously SPI-gated symbols are internal to the package and the empty inventories are enforced fail-closed.

sourceCompatibility.policy: Vocello product generation consumes the owned engine actor, classified session, and product finalization contracts. QwenVoiceCore imports the named legacy SPI only for the remaining load/prewarm and schema-3 conditioning bridge. The MLXAudio package, products, targets, modules, and public APIs remain available as implementation compatibility surfaces.
